reviews.review_text:
The game is still going through MAJOR changes. I took a 6 months away from the game last year because major changes made it not fun, came back in the winter most things were ironed out. I suspect this will happen at least a few more times over the next couple of years. I am okay with that if you are not okay with a game that changes a lot and want a glacial amount of change there are plenty of other MOBAs you could enjoy. 

What this game isn't:
-It is not smite, you can actually move not just glide, you can see, and interact with the terrain, its not just polygon walls
- It is not set in its ways it is changing constantly, your favorite hero will become worthless as some point. 
-Constant with skilled teammates or enemies, in both directions.
-Always fun

What this game is:
-Quick paced
-CC hell scape
-Equally as toxic as all moba's
-Lobbies can be as funning as old School CoD lobbies
-the satisfying best team combos of any moba ever
-Addicting like MOBAs are


Things that can help make it a better experience:
- Rage Quite
- Take a few months off
- Make friends in lobbies
- Don't play Ranked
- Play the other rotating game mode
- Take a poop mid match
- Cry

last update was the final straw, matchmaking sucks so hard, players are toxic AF and this last update seemed to make it worse. You either have to play a 20 min match with idiots and/or squeekers or get a matchmaking ban if you get fed up and leave, also heavily censored chat where you cant type "push the minions and stop chaseing kills", fix matchmaking before you try to enforce leaving a dead match

The game is fun enough.  Balancing is about as good as any moba so not great but manageable.  The issue is their servers.  Game is hard to run about 20% of the matches I load into my screen is still locked in the loading screen.  I can move and do stuff just can't see what I'm doing and have to reload the whole game which takes 3 business days to load.  I'm currently sitting here with a 1 hour band from crashes on the only game on my pc that crashes and because I loaded into a match and couldn't exit the loading screen and then the match abandoned itself while I was reloading the game so I can actually play.  I am an old paragon player and honestly I'm disappointed that this is what I paid for.  I like the characters and I like the game play but with of the 400 hours I have into this game I am so sick and tired of the absolutely horrible servers it runs on.  I want to buy skins but why would I put money into an account that at this rate is gonna wind up with lengthy ban after lengthy ban.  I may try reaching out to the devs but honestly i doubt they will do anything anyways.  No game company seems to care about the people that keep them in business these days.
New update gonna kill it just like paragon.. no one asked for more OP BS and here we are terrible decision. No one plays characters in their respective roles already now they definitely won't
Game turned into CSGO super predatory, loot box ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ for skins and stuff. gameplay feels okay but itll never be like PARAGON!

decent gameplay and performance. the only pain point is the community. why is it so prevalent that you join a match and the randoms are spouting hard slurs and insults. like why do reports do nothing, thats absolutely abhorrent and why i cant recommend this game

I read Hot-Dogs review and if there are afks, tollers rage, quitters, blames and toxic community then this games community is very weak then if you played older mobas or other games you know this are nothing today i was called so many things i even learned those insults most of them were the n or r word the game can be good but it's the devs that need to make it better by listening to the players not the charts

Only game i can attempt to play and it takes forever for me to even start the game, then when i get into a game, there's a chance the game crashes for no reason which gives me an afk penalty when i try to load the game back up again (took 6 minutes for it to even start the second time).

Matchmaking is horrendous. If not one of the worst in any kind of MOBA game i have played.
If matchmaking is bad=community is toxic.

Don't get me wrong, gameplay is cool, hero designs are fun but basic-core things like matchmaking, loading screens, tutorials is so bad that it ruins everything.
This game had potential but i am 100% sure that the online-service will go down within year or two if they continue to do what they do. There is about 1-2k players, at most 3k..for a MOBA game that is just too low. 
Don't invest your time in this game, let the devs get into dept for their over the ♥♥♥♥-work.
Great game glad the are carrying the Paragon model. Make sure to rotate.

Fun. Want to go against some ranged character in solo lane in a casual match that can completely dunk on you cause scaling is equal across the board while they have more movement capabilities than a melee champ? This is the game for you! Want to then get voice/chat spammed along with bings about how bad you are and that you should uninstall? Another check mark here! After finally learning the game and barely being able to counter some sweat with a currently unbalanced character you will become addicted to play knowing you will hate half the games you get in. 2k hours and dealing with the lack of early game balancing to set you up for failure while giving nearly every adc an insane amount of escapability needing a support practically useless in most cases is fundamentally the most extreme case of maintaining the hardcore fanbase while letting no newcomers in strategy. 

PS: I do thoroughly enjoy this game. Just wish they'd build a strategy meta rather than keep it feeling more like a hero shooter. But overall the balance is good, some slight shifting every patch. Lot of new additions are good but want a core idea that if you go against some melee as ranged in 1v1 solo lane, the mobility/dmg a ranged should do early is not preventing me from either getting to them (unless i plan perfectly) or they do less dmg as it should be a scaling/farming character imo.

One of the best MOBAs. 

Ruined because you are unable to queue with more than 1 person past Diamond rank. Me and my friends played together to get to diamond and now cannot play the game together anymore. Sacrificing the entire TEAM part of the game at an attempt to appeal to bad players. 

The game has voice chat and a ping system, the only inherent "advantage" 5 stacking has is the fact that the people know each other.

One of the worst implementations I have ever seen for a "team based game" and this game absolutely deserves to die until it is changed.
Games balance is horrible, it makes no sense, I regret ever downloading and playing it.

Pretty sure every game I've played is just bots. No one talks, everyones movements are snappy and they do the most random ♥♥♥♥. Im top scoring with 27 kills in my first few matches, and I know damn well im not good at video games. Is the community just this brain dead or something?

Be aware that Omeda Studios has been using generative AI in their marketing, or has been uninvolved and lacking oversight in their advertisements at the very least. They also seem to struggle with knowing how to manage their money, as they blow through millions upon millions a year with a small dev team that receives a great deal of their assets/code for free from previous projects.
As long as they don't fix smurfing it's pointless to play matchmaking

The game and gameplay is fine. What is not fine is the ludicrous and egregious matchmaking bans for AFK. Not just if you are playing ranked where the game actually matters, but quick matches. Just be sure that if you are going to play a game that literally no emergency happens. 

If your dog is going insane at a solicitor at the front door don't worry the game is more important you can always buy new blinds or furniture. Your wife has to go to the bathroom and needs you to watch dinner so it doesn't burn, let it burn the game is too important.

Not only this but if you step out return and are the best on the team they will postpone your ban until you have completed the match because you should be dedicated to the game.

Whatever happened to doing this for fun? it's a game for Christmas sake! Not a job, not a war, not brain surgery. It isn't that important. So what I needed to step out and take a piss or do something while a game was going on I didn't draft into a ranked match it was casual. 

That's what I thought this was a "Quick Match" uh news flash a-holes 30-45 minutes per match is not quick. You are punishing people for having lives outside of a fabricated reality because it isn't fair. Tough titties, is the matchmaking system fair, no. Are the unbalanced items and heros fair, no. Is it fair that people come in a just absolutely suck at the game and feed for the entirety of the match, no. Yet this is permissable.

I invite the devs to lick my left boot heel if they are so concerned about wasting time they should delete the game because it by nature is a waste of time.
great game, just need more players, bring ur buddies!!

I'm not here to cry about the ranked system. I'm here to tell you the game has been crashing on the lowest settings you can pick; legit post-processing and everything set to potato and the game will still crash. My GPU is a tad old but we are not near outdated. I have uninstalled and reinstalled; everything you could think of the game just crashes. Then I started to catch bans because of the game crashing on me in the middle of matches. I'm not even going to bother with ranked when this keeps happening. Not worth paying for a game that is experiencing a memory leak or whatever is causing this.

Bad, bad moba. Horrible balance, horrible team matchmaking, horrible metas. Everything about this game is designed to make your experienced as miserable as possible by some of the sweatiest people you'll ever encounter. Avoid it.
Cheater and botter are all over the place. Not that Omeda cares...
a fun well polished moba that feels immersive with the way they handle the enviroment
This game is not good, lagging the all time

bad Balance
L game
Cant stop
game is fun
Awesome game! Hooked!
Great game.
love it
Fun moba
Takes me back to PARAGON
Add role queue
Some of the most fun ive ever had gaming
BETTER THAN PARAGON
